# Normalization layers

LayerNorm/RMSNorm variants, including SandwichNorm (required for stable recurrent-depth bias).

Registry: ``praxis.NORMALIZATION_REGISTRY`` (5 entries)

## `layer_norm` - LayerNorm

LayerNorm with configurable pre/post norm behavior.

Source: [praxis/normalization/layer_norm.py:11](../praxis/normalization/layer_norm.py#L11)

## `none` - BaseNorm

Base normalization class that provides a no-op implementation.

Source: [praxis/normalization/base.py:10](../praxis/normalization/base.py#L10)

## `post_rms_norm` - PostRMSNorm

RMSNorm that only applies post-normalization.

Source: [praxis/normalization/rms_norm.py:52](../praxis/normalization/rms_norm.py#L52)

## `rms_norm` - RMSNorm

RMSNorm with configurable pre/post norm behavior.

Source: [praxis/normalization/rms_norm.py:11](../praxis/normalization/rms_norm.py#L11)

## `sandwich` - SandwichNorm

Sandwich normalization that applies both pre and post normalization.

Source: [praxis/normalization/sandwich_norm.py:8](../praxis/normalization/sandwich_norm.py#L8)
